# Generic → Generic Multiply-Accumulate → 32x32 MAC3

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Generic → Generic Multiply-Accumulate → 32x32 MAC3

32x32 MAC3

32x32 MAC3
Performs configurable multiplication between four sources and accumulation using two products
by using CISA. The multiplicands, products signs, and accumulation operations are user
configured according to the configuration register set. Each source is 32-bit wide. The
destination is 72-bit wide.
Available Switches
         Number of atomic operations. An atomic operation is defined as a single multiply-
Dop
         accumulate/subtract using two products operation.
     Configuration register. The instruction operands and signs are configured according to
cfgX one of the vector registers. The X is replaced with i0,i1...i10,i11...o2,o3. The default value
     is cfgi4 which selects the vi4 vector register.
Intrinsic Names
vgenmacll3_v32_v32_v40
Instruction details in the instruction set specification
Intrinsic     vgenmacll3_v32_v32_v40[_p]
name
Spec syntax   vgenmacll3 {Dop [,cfgX]} vx, vy, voz[0], ?vprX

Return type   vec40_t

              1    DOP             uint8     1..2             Number of atomic operations
              2    IN_CFGX         vec_t                      Configuration register

3    IN1_V32         vec_t                      Input vector operand
Operands
              4    IN2_V32         vec_t                      Input vector operand
              5    IN3_V40         vec40_t                    Output vector operand
              6    IN_VPR          vprex_t                    Vector predicate operand
              vec_t vIn;
              vec_t vIn2;
              vec40_t vRes;
C example     vec_t vcfgIn;
              vprex_t vecPred;
              ...
              vRes = vgenmacll3_v32_v32_v40_p (2, vcfgIn, vIn, vIn2, vRes, vecPred);

                   IN_VPR last operand is relevant only for vgenmacll3_v32_v32_v40_p
